info.title: Registry Witness API
info.description: Standalone claim evaluation, rendering, and credential issuance API.

get.description: Returns the OpenID4VCI issuer metadata for Registry Witness' dc+sd-jwt issuance profile.

200.description: Standalone router accepted the reload request

example.detail: standalone router has no reloadable external config handle

get.summary: List claims visible to the caller

post.summary: Evaluate claims for multiple subjects inline

403.description: Not authorized for requested claim, purpose, disclosure, or format

example.detail: the requested disclosure profile is not allowed

example.detail: the requested claim format is not supported
example.title: Claim format not supported

example.detail: the request conflicts with existing state
example.title: Request conflict

example.title: Request too large

post.summary: Evaluate one configured federation profile for a trusted peer
post.description: Accepts a compact JWS request with typ registry-witness-request+jwt. This route is mounted only when federation is enabled and uses body-JWT authentication instead of API key or bearer authentication.

schema.description: Compact JWS signed federation evaluation request

200.description: Compact JWS signed federation evaluation response

403.description: Peer, profile, purpose, or subject id type is not allowed

503.description: Source service or peer key service is unavailable

post.description: Issues a dc+sd-jwt credential for an authenticated self-attestation principal. Error responses use the OpenID4VCI error envelope, not RFC 7807 Problem Details.

400.description: Invalid credential request, proof, or type

get.description: Returns an authorization-code credential offer. Error responses use the OpenID4VCI error envelope, not RFC 7807 Problem Details.

post.description: Returns a c_nonce for proof-of-possession. Error responses use the OpenID4VCI error envelope, not RFC 7807 Problem Details.
